payload.answer: Extracted three memory cards: Sam's employment update (Goldman -> Point72), Sam's music preference (Bill Evans with recent shift to early Coltrane), and a planned catch-up about AI infra with an article request.

entity_resolution.reason: Transcript does not provide unique IDs; entities are taken from names/mentions in the dialogue.

payload.intent: Extract atomic memory cards from the transcript about Sam's employment and music listening preferences.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam has been listening to Bill Evans, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele and Sam planned to catch up about AI infra and Sam asked Daniele to send the article.

details: Captured employment change: left Goldman last month, joined Point72.
Captured recent listening preference: Bill Evans generally, more early Coltrane lately.
Captured short-term coordination intent: catch up about AI infra; Sam requests the article.

repair_options: If Sam is not the same person across conversations, disambiguate which 'Sam' this refers to before saving.
Optionally store the AI infra article request only if an identifier/link for the article is available in a later message.
